Mapping rules:
1. Lookup Board Specialty 1 against Taxonomy Code in Crosswalk if length = 10 characters.
  - if found, direct map the input
  - If not found, go to step 2
2. Lookup Board Specialty 1 against Taxonomy Description in Crosswalk if length <> 10 characters.
  - if found, Map Code returned from the crosswalk
  - If not found, Reject the record with the error message "Board Specialty 1 is not valid and needs to be corrected on the input record"

Note:
1. The below logic check should happen only if Board Speciality 2 is present
2. Logic check not requried if it is blank

If Board Specialty 1 = Board Specialty 2
      Skip this logics below
   Else
    1. Lookup Board Specialty 2 against Taxonomy Code in Crosswalk if length = 10 characters.
  - if found, direct map the input
  - If not found, go to step 2
    2. Lookup Board Specialty 2 against Taxonomy Description in Crosswalk if length <> 10 characters.
  - If not found, Reject the record with the error message "Board Specialty 1 is not valid and needs to be corrected on the input record"

Create a duplicate record on the output with the same details except for the crosswalk result from Board Specialty 2 mapped as "Primary Specialty"
column4:
Ex.,
Board Specialty 1 -  Internal Medicine-Medical Onc
Board Specialty 2 -  Internal Medicine-Hematology

2 records are expected for the same provider with their primary specialty having the result of the taxonomy code values

Mapping rules:
"Map as per the crosswalk below -
PCP -> ""PCP""
SPECIALIST or Specialist -> ""Specialty"""

"Map ""Male"" if input value is ""M"" or ""Male"" or ""MALE""
Map ""Female"" if input value is ""F"" or ""Female"" or ""FEMALE"""

Yes -> Map as "No"
No -> Map as "Yes"
Hospital-Based -> Map as "No"

I-Network Layout: Panel Status (Accepting New Patients, Accepting Existing Patients, Closed)

"If length of state is <> 2 characters
 Lookup State names against crosswalk to get the 2 digit code and map that code
Else
 Map the input state as-is

Exclude the records when State code is not in (TX, NJ, GA, SC, PA)"
